scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check content-v3.js && node --check millennium-core.js && node --check millennium-journey.js && node --check millennium-stability.js && node --check millennium-backend.js && node --check millennium-polish.js && node --check service-worker.js && node --check scripts/check-build-consistency.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-deploy.mjs && node --check scripts/plan-migration.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-css.mjs
